title: A Final Meal
content: You open the case. Inside is a thick stack of internal audits from the Atlas Foundation. Names of executives are circled in red, with dollar amounts typed next to them that would make a bank manager weep.||A loose receipt falls out. It's Vane's bill from the night of his death. One glass of tap water. Zero food. He wasn't here to dine; he was here to survive a transaction.||You close the case and leave quickly, feeling the eyes of the gray-suited men boring into your back. You've got what you came for.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Atlas Foundation internal audit recovered.
